# n2n-post2site

> Local MCP bridge for AI-assisted website publishing.

n2n-post2site connects an AI IDE client to a protected website publishing API. It does not expose databases, filesystems, shell commands, deployments, payments, or account administration.

## Use cases

- Draft website articles with an AI assistant.
- Validate local working drafts before saving to a server.
- Save, preview, and publish server drafts through explicit tools.
- Upload only selected assets.
- Keep host-specific fields in backend-declared `content_payload`.

## Environment

- `CONTENT_API_BASE_URL`: base URL of the protected publishing API.
- `CONTENT_API_KEY`: content API key.

## Primary tools

- `n2n_list_inventory`
- `n2n_check_duplicates`
- `n2n_validate_working_draft`
- `n2n_list_drafts`
- `n2n_create_draft`
- `n2n_update_draft`
- `n2n_validate_draft`
- `n2n_preview_draft`
- `n2n_upload_asset`
- `n2n_publish_draft`

## Primary resources

- `post2site://capabilities`
- `post2site://site-context`
- `post2site://editorial-policy`
- `post2site://inventory/stats`
- `post2site://inventory/resources/{target_identifier}`
- `post2site://drafts/{draft_id}`

## Docs

- `README.md`: overview and setup.
- `docs/BACKEND_API.md`: HTTP contract.
- `docs/RESOURCES_REFERENCE.md`: read-only MCP resources.
- `docs/TOOLS_REFERENCE.md`: tool schemas and examples.
- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`: runtime layers.
- `docs/CLIENT_SMOKE.md`: protocol and client smoke testing.
- `examples/mock-backend/README.md`: local example backend.
- `ROADMAP.md`: current state and scoped next work.
- `CHANGELOG.md`: release history.

Package: `n2n-post2site`
Repository: `https://github.com/n2ns/n2n-post2site`
License: MIT
